entity_status: active (implied from active USDOT, active state business listings, and active web presence)
registry_source: GA Secretary of State eCorp (control number not retrieved due to anti-bot block); business directories
notes: FMCSA: USDOT 2569101 / MC-937649 confirmed for 'COMFORT CARE TRANSPORT SERVICES INC' at 412 Stonewall St, Cartersville GA 30120. Active USDOT with 14 power units / 17 drivers — meaningful fleet for tuck-in consideration. Input address (32 Lake Top Dr SE, Cartersville GA 30121) does NOT match FMCSA physical address but is within the same Cartersville area; the Lake Top Dr address is referenced in some directories as Best Care Transport Services and may be an alternate operating location or owner residence. The other Comfort Care candidate (USDOT 3456026 'COMFORT CARE TRANSPORTATION SERVICES INC' in Conyers GA) is a different/smaller carrier (1 PU, 1 driver) and not the target. Carrier operates intrastate non-hazmat only; 'NOT AUTHORIZED' note applies only to interstate for-hire and does not block intrastate operations. GA SoS record could not be retrieved directly (ecorp.sos.ga.gov returned 403); 21-year operating history from secondary sources implies founding circa 2005.
